overview: AI Prep Mentor is a full-stack, AI-powered NEET/JEE exam preparation platform combining smart study scheduling, adaptive practice questions, performance analytics, and an AI mentor chatbot. The platform helps students maximize their exam scores through data-driven study planning and personalized coaching.
features: Smart Dashboard with today's study tasks and quick progress stats
Weekly timetable with mark-complete/skip and auto-rescheduling of missed tasks
PYQ practice with 50+ questions, subject/difficulty filters, countdown timer, and accuracy tracking
Performance analytics with accuracy trends, subject breakdowns, and weak area highlights
AI Mentor chat with rule-based personalized study advice
Persistent sidebar navigation with mobile-responsive hamburger collapse
